name: Websolute S.p.A.
summary: Websolute S.p.A. operates as a digital company in Italy. The company creates digital PR and social engagement experiences that connects to people; develops e-commerce projects on the Magento platform; and designs and implements solutions in virtual and augmented reality. It also provides performance marketing agency services; video storytelling and advertising services; e-business consulting and management services in outsourcing of online stores; and platform mobile development services. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Pesaro, Italy.
